pinterest.text: Most 6-year-olds take 4 tries to solve this word search. Every wrong turn is a micro-decision. They don't know they're problem-solving. Save this for Saturday morning. More puzzles like this in JoyMaze — free on iOS & Android.

instagram.text:
You put it on the table without explanation. They didn't look up for 20 minutes. 
That's what a good puzzle does. The right one for the right age — and they disappear into it.
This is the kind of focus that spills into other parts of their day.
For the parent who plans ahead. JoyMaze — link in bio.

youtube.text:
Watch what happens when a 6-year-old gets handed a maze with no instructions. They scan, backtrack, and try again, building spatial reasoning without realizing it. For parents who choose activities with intention, more printable puzzles at joymaze.com.
